analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒波動不定，受到多個因素影響。道瓊指數今年上升8%，但投資者應該謹慎評估是否該購買相關的ETF。Cathie Wood 領導 Ark Investment Management 的基金購入市場下跌時的「颠覆性」科技股，包括 Tesla 股價。SpaceX 將於 7 月 7 日加入 Nasdaq-100，歷史預測股價一年後走勢。伯克希爾哈薩威是一間工業集團，但其實是以保險業務為基礎，對投資者來說是一個重要的考量。里維安電動汽車公司提升2026年全年財報預期，但這也意味著公司將面臨更大的挑戰。

【結語】
投資者應該謹慎評估市場情緒和財經新聞的影響。不要被短期波動所迷惑，應該關注公司的基本面和長期發展前景。投資者應該保持冷靜和理性，避免做出倉促的決定。最後，投資者應該保持多元化的投資組合，分散風險和減少損失。

【精選個股】
NVIDIA - NVIDIA - 公司在AI基礎設施製造商領域佔據重要地位，受DeepSeek事件影響股價下跌16%。
TSLA - Tesla - 公司在電動汽車領域佔據重要地位，受里維安電動汽車公司提升財報預期影響股價下跌。
Berkshire Hathaway - 伯克希爾哈薩威 - 公司在保險業務領域佔據重要地位，對投資者來說是一個重要的考量。

風險提醒：投資者應該謹慎評估市場情緒和財經新聞的影響，避免做出倉促的決定。

items.title: The Dow Is Up 8% So Far This Year -- Its Best 6 Months Since 2021. Should You Buy This DJIA ETF?
items.summary: Just because "the Dow" is in the news doesn't mean it's the best way to invest your money.
items.zh_title: 道瓊指數今年上升8%，自2021年以來最佳六個月。該DJIA ETF值得購買嗎？
items.zh_point: 道瓊指數的表現雖然令人鼓舞，但投資者應該謹慎評估是否該購買相關的ETF。

items.title: Cathie Wood buys $38.1 million of tumbling megacap stock
items.summary: Cathie Wood, chief of Ark Investment Management, is known for buying “disruptive” tech stocks during market pullbacks. That’s what she just did, adding one of her highest-conviction investments, Tesla, as the stock fell more than 7% in a day. In 2025, the flagship Ark Innovation ETF gained 35.49%, ...
items.zh_title: Cathie Wood 購入 38.1 億美元的暴跌大型股
items.zh_point: Cathie Wood 領導 Ark Investment Management 的基金，買入市場下跌時的「颠覆性」科技股，最近購入了她對 Tesla 的投資，該股價在一天內下跌超過 7%。

items.title: SpaceX Is Set to Join the Nasdaq-100 on July 7. Here's Where History Says the Stock Could Trade 1 Year From Now.
items.summary: Inclusion in the Nasdaq-100 is a big milestone for SpaceX, which recently went public.
items.zh_title: SpaceX 將於 7 月 7 日加入 Nasdaq-100，歷史預測股價一年後走勢
items.zh_point: SpaceX 的 Nasdaq-100 加入將是一個里程碑，公司最近上市。根據歷史數據，預測 SpaceX 股價一年後可能會出現哪些走勢。

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway Is Really a Financial Powerhouse in Disguise. Here's What That Means for Investors.
items.summary: Berkshire Hathaway is an industrial conglomerate, but it is built atop an insurance business.
items.zh_title: 伯克希爾哈薩威是隱藏的金融強權。對投資者而言，這意味著什麼？
items.zh_point: 伯克希爾哈薩威是一間工業集團，但其實是以保險業務為基礎。這使得它在金融領域擁有強大的實力，對投資者來說是一個重要的考量。

items.title: Rivian Just Raised Its 2026 Outlook While Tesla Stock Stumbled. Is the Electric Vehicle Underdog Finally a Buy?
items.summary: The electric vehicle maker just raised its full-year outlook -- and the hard part starts now.
items.zh_title: 里維安突然提升2026年財報預期，特斯拉股價卻跌倒。電動汽車新秀終於買入機會？
items.zh_point: 里維安電動汽車公司提升2026年全年財報預期，但這也意味著公司將面臨更大的挑戰。

items.title: Evacuation ordered at National Mall as storms gather ahead of Trump's America 250 speech
items.summary: As the evacuation order was broadcast on the National Mall, some people were not leaving the area. National Guard troops had to order people to leave.
items.zh_title: 國家廣場發布疏散命令 美國250周年演講前天氣惡劣
items.zh_point: 美國國家廣場因為即將來臨的惡劣天氣而發布疏散命令，部分人仍未離開，國民警衛隊人員被迫下令讓人們離開。

items.title: I’ve worked with over 5,000 kids: I swear by this No. 1 parenting rule—it’s ‘surprisingly simple’
items.summary: Child development expert Siggie Cohen, who has worked with over 5,000 families, shares one communication mistake she sees parents make every day. Here's why she says it can backfire, when to set clear boundaries and how to use questions more effectively.
items.zh_title: 我與5,000多個家庭合作：這個關鍵父母規則竟如此簡單
items.zh_point: 一位兒童發展專家分享她在與父母合作過程中發現的關鍵溝通錯誤，解釋為什麼這種錯誤可能會造成後果，以及如何設定清晰的界限和有效使用問題來促進溝通。

items.title: Erdogan's warm ties with Trump offer Turkey an edge ahead of NATO summit
items.summary: Trump's affinity for strongmen leaders made him an admirer of Erdogan, who amassed power in Turkey as its prime minister and in his 13th year as president.
items.zh_title: 特朗普與埃爾多安的親密關係為土耳其在北約峰會前帶來優勢
items.zh_point: 特朗普對強人領袖的喜好使他成為埃爾多安的仰慕者，後者在土耳其總理和總統任內累積了權力。這種特殊關係可能使土耳其在北約峰會前獲得優勢。

items.title: BTIG names an athleisure company, cybersecurity stock and more as its top picks for the second half of 2026
items.summary: The firm named 55 large- and small-cap stocks that it thinks are set to perform well in the next six months.
items.zh_title: BTIG 選出 55 支股票為 2026 年下半年最佳選擇
items.zh_point: BTIG 公布其對 55 支大型和小型股票的評估，認為這些股票在未來六個月內將表現良好。

items.title: The World Cup sends prediction market volumes soaring to record highs
items.summary: Trading volumes on Kalshi and Polymarket both hit record highs in June. Rothera, a new prediction market platform, was also able to manage $2 billion in volume.
items.zh_title: 世界盃足球賽激起預測市場交易量大幅上升
items.zh_point: 世界盃足球賽期間，Kalshi 和 Polymarket 的交易量均創下新高，新平台 Rothera 也達到 200 億美元的交易量。

items.title: Gamer trades in $1,000 of physical discs at GameStop, days after Sony announces end of disc era
items.summary: While some collectors may plan to hoard their physical media, one Columbus gamer decided to liquidate his collection
items.zh_title: 玩家在索尼宣布光碟時代結束後將 1,000 美元的光碟賣掉
items.zh_point: 一名哥倫布玩家在索尼宣布結束光碟時代後，決定將自己的光碟收藏賣掉。

items.title: ‘She wants him gone’: My friend took in a homeless man as a caretaker. After 10 years, how can she evict him?
items.summary: “He lived rent-free, helping her with health-related issues and other tasks.”
items.zh_title: 她想趕他走：十年來，朋友收留無家可歸的人當看護，如何趕走他？
items.zh_point: 她收留他十年，讓他免租住，幫助她處理健康問題和其他事務，但現在她想趕走他，卻不知道該如何做。

items.title: Here’s what’s worth streaming in July 2026 on Netflix, Hulu, HBO Max and more
items.summary: Why it’s a good month to save on streaming, despite the return of ‘Enola Holmes’ to Netflix and ‘Silo’ to Apple
items.zh_title: 7月2026年在Netflix、Hulu、HBO Max等平台上值得流覽的內容
items.zh_point: 7月2026年雖然Netflix和Apple TV+會推出新內容，但這個月仍然是節省流媒體費用的好時機。

items.title: Why a founder at age 50 is twice as likely to find success as one at age 30
items.summary: Older workers are fighting ageism by starting their own businesses — and they’re outperforming younger entrepreneurs
items.zh_title: 50歲的創業者比30歲的創業者更容易成功
items.zh_point: 年長的創業者通過創辦自己的公司來抗拒年齡歧視，並且他們的成績遠超年輕的創業者。

items.title: Why June’s jobs and inflation data are bullish for bonds
items.summary: The new jobs report is worse than many people realize.
items.zh_title: 為什麼六月的就業和通膨數據對債券是有利的
items.zh_point: 新一份就業報告比許多人想像的還要糟糕。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek事件影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下跌，Nasdaq指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，Nvidia股價下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 倫敦金銀市場收盤下跌
items.zh_point: 倫敦金價跌1.4%，銀價跌2.5%，連續兩天下跌，金價下跌兩次，銀價下跌三次。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 關於中國DeepSeek AI的要點
items.zh_point: 中國新興公司宣稱，使用高性能AI模型的成本較低，並不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋找不會淹沒美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 深度尋找事件雖然導致Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭股價下跌，但市場恐慌情緒過度。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與通訊業新聞匯報：市場談話
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和通訊業最新動態，包括市場分析和投資趨勢。

items.title: SA Asks: What's the best space stock play right now?
items.zh_title: 南非問：目前最好的太空股投資機會是什麼？
items.zh_point: 南非投資者正在尋找最好的太空股投資機會，了解太空行業的趨勢和發展方向。

items.title: StubHub under investigation in Texas over “ghost ticketing” charges
items.zh_title: StubHub面臨德克薩斯州調查：涉及「幽靈門票」指控
items.zh_point: StubHub因「幽靈門票」問題而面臨德克薩斯州的調查。根據指控，StubHub可能在售賣假門票或未能提供正確的門票信息。這可能對消費者造成損失，調查正在進行中。

items.title: Trending stocks this week as rate-cut hopes lift markets while tech remains volatile
items.zh_title: 本周熱門股票趨勢：利率下降希望提振市場，而科技股仍波動不定
items.zh_point: 本周市場受到利率下降的希望影響，許多股票的價格上升。然而，科技股仍然存在波動，不確定性仍然存在。

items.title: The 1-Minute Market Report, July 4, 2026
items.zh_title: 2026年7月4日市場簡報
items.zh_point: 市場簡報將於2026年7月4日發布，內容包括市場趨勢、股票表現、財經新聞等。

items.title: NiSource: A Premier Play On Data Center Electricity Demand
items.zh_title: NiSource：數據中心電力需求的首選投資機會
items.zh_point: NiSource 是一家能源公司，正在投資電力基礎設施，以滿足日益增長的數據中心電力需求。該公司的業務範圍包括天然氣和電力供應，目前正在發展數據中心電力需求的市場。

items.title: Storms threaten Trump rally to mark U.S. 250th anniversary in Washington
items.zh_title: 風暴威脅川普在華盛頓慶祝美國250週年紀念日集會
items.zh_point: 川普在華盛頓舉辦的美國250週年紀念日集會面臨風暴威脅，可能會影響活動的進行。

items.title: North Korea’s Kim oversees cruise missile launch from new naval destroyer
items.zh_title: 朝鮮金正恩觀察巡航導彈發射自新海軍驅逐艦
items.zh_point: 朝鮮領導人金正恩在新海軍驅逐艦上觀察發射巡航導彈，表明朝鮮軍事力量的增強。

items.title: Vance says Britain needs political change, pledges support for next PM
items.zh_title: 范斯 (Vance) 表示英國需要政治變革，承諾支持下任首相
items.zh_point: 英國前財長范斯表示，英國需要政治變革，承諾支持下任首相，表明他對英國政治未來的看法和態度。

items.title: As Venezuela death toll rises, survivor recounts days beneath the rubble
items.zh_title: 委內瑞拉死亡人數升高，倖存者憶述在瓦礫下的日子
items.zh_point: 委內瑞拉發生嚴重地震，造成多人死亡，倖存者分享在瓦礫下的驚險經歷。

items.title: Trump administration proposes 702 regulatory rollbacks in deregulatory push
items.zh_title: 川普政府提出 702 項規制緩和措施
items.zh_point: 川普政府正在推動規制緩和政策，計畫推出 702 項新規定，以減少政府對企業的干預力。
